fetch.description: Fetch live web content. Use to query OWASP (https://owasp.org/Top10/), NVD (https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-XXXX-YYYY), and OSV (https://osv.dev/vulnerability/GHSA-XXXX) for current vulnerability details.

aws-docs.description: AWS documentation lookup. Use for AWS IAM policies, Secrets Manager, KMS, and security service guidance.
